context.projectOverview: agent-bober — ESM/TypeScript. Final sprint: remove the two verified dead-code orphans (stashAndRestore, saveOutline) + their barrel lines. Tiny, isolated, low-risk.

principles: See .bober/principles.md — ESM .js specifiers, import type, no sync fs, unicode section headers, conventional commits. STRICT: noUnusedLocals + noUnusedParameters; eslint no-unused-vars is an ERROR.
criticalNotes: stashAndRestore: definition src/utils/git.ts:154 (doc comment 149-171). Delete the whole function + doc. Remove its barrel re-export line in src/utils/index.ts:8. Per curator, git.ts needs NO import changes (nothing else used those imports exclusively) — but double-check after deleting and prune anything that becomes unused.

saveOutline: definition src/state/outline-state.ts:28 (doc 17-37). Delete ONLY this function. DO NOT delete the file — it ALSO exports readOutline which is LIVE (called at pipeline.ts:828). Remove its barrel re-export line in src/state/index.ts:44.

MANDATORY IMPORT PRUNE: after deleting saveOutline, the imports `writeFile` (outline-state.ts line 1) and `ensureDir` (line 4) become unused. They MUST be removed or build/lint FAILS (noUnusedLocals + no-unused-vars=error). Verify readOutline does not also use them before pruning — if readOutline uses one of them, keep that one.
There are NO test files referencing stashAndRestore or saveOutline (curator grep-verified). Do NOT create new tests.

DO NOT touch the 3 false positives: runPlanAnswerInteractive (cli/index.ts:152), summarizeSprint (context-handoff.ts:171), readBriefing (src/index.ts:153 public export). git diff must NOT include cli/commands/plan.ts, context-handoff.ts, briefing-state.ts, or the readBriefing line in src/index.ts.
toolingNote: tokensave v6.1.1 available. Use `npx vitest run`. The 6 known cockpit-integration E2E MCP failures are pre-existing — ignore.
